project_area: wearable AI-powered retinal imaging for early detection of eye and brain diseases
demographic_requirements: startups based in Baltimore, with a focus on inclusive innovation and community-based care access
eligibility_summary: Open to Baltimore-based startups, particularly those in medtech and AI, with a focus on advancing health technology for underserved communities. Applicants must demonstrate potential for FDA clearance, commercialization, and impact on community health outcomes.
